useRouter.description: Returns a router instance for programmatic navigation in Client Components. Provides push, replace, refresh, prefetch, back, and forward methods.

usePathname.description: Returns the current URL pathname as a string. Automatically re-renders when the pathname changes.

useSearchParams.description: Returns a read-only URLSearchParams object for the current URL's query string parameters.

useParams.signature: function useParams<T extends Record<string, string | string[]>>(): T
useParams.description: Returns an object containing the current route's dynamic parameters filled in by the URL.

useSelectedLayoutSegment.description: Returns the active route segment one level below the Layout it is called from. Useful for active navigation styling.

useSelectedLayoutSegments.description: Returns an array of all active route segments below the Layout it is called from.

redirect.signature: function redirect(url: string, type?: RedirectType): never
redirect.description: Redirects the user to another URL. Can be used in Server Components, Route Handlers, and Server Actions. Throws NEXT_REDIRECT internally.

permanentRedirect.signature: function permanentRedirect(url: string, type?: RedirectType): never
permanentRedirect.description: Redirects the user with a 308 permanent redirect status. Can be used in Server Components, Route Handlers, and Server Actions.

notFound.description: Throws NEXT_NOT_FOUND error rendering the not-found.tsx UI for the route segment. Terminates rendering of the component tree.

NextRequest.description: Extends the Web Request API with convenience methods for cookies, geo, ip, and nextUrl. Used in Middleware and Route Handlers.

NextResponse.description: Extends the Web Response API with static methods json(), redirect(), rewrite(), and next() for Middleware and Route Handlers.

NextResponse.json.signature: static NextResponse.json(body: any, init?: ResponseInit): NextResponse
NextResponse.json.description: Creates a JSON response with the given body and optional ResponseInit options including status, headers.

NextResponse.redirect.signature: static NextResponse.redirect(url: string | URL, status?: number): NextResponse
NextResponse.redirect.description: Creates a redirect response to the specified URL with an optional status code (defaults to 307).

NextResponse.rewrite.signature: static NextResponse.rewrite(url: string | URL, init?: MiddlewareResponseInit): NextResponse
NextResponse.rewrite.description: Rewrites the request to a different URL while preserving the original URL in the browser.

NextResponse.next.description: Continues the middleware chain. Can optionally modify request headers for downstream processing.

cookies.description: Returns a read-only cookies store for incoming request cookies. Supports get(), getAll(), has() in Server Components; set(), delete() in Server Actions and Route Handlers.

headers.description: Returns a read-only Headers object for the incoming request. Supports get(), has(), entries(), forEach(), keys(), values() methods.

revalidatePath.description: Purges cached data for a specific path. The type parameter determines if only the page or the entire layout tree is revalidated.

revalidateTag.description: Purges all cached data associated with a specific cache tag. Used for on-demand revalidation with fetch's next.tags option.

unstable_cache.signature: function unstable_cache<T>(fn: (...args: any[]) => Promise<T>, keyParts?: string[], options?: { revalidate?: number; tags?: string[] }): (...args: any[]) => Promise<T>
unstable_cache.description: Wraps an async function to cache its return value. Supports revalidation period and cache tags for on-demand revalidation.

generateMetadata.signature: async function generateMetadata(props: { params: Params; searchParams: SearchParams }, parent: ResolvingMetadata): Promise<Metadata>
generateMetadata.description: Generates dynamic metadata for a page based on route params and search params. Can access parent metadata for composition.

generateStaticParams.description: Defines the list of route segment parameters to statically generate at build time. Used with dynamic route segments.

generateViewport.signature: function generateViewport(props: { params: Params; searchParams: SearchParams }): Viewport | Promise<Viewport>
generateViewport.description: Generates dynamic viewport configuration for a page. Returns viewport-related meta tags.

Image.description: Optimized image component extending HTML with automatic optimization, lazy loading, blur placeholders, and responsive image support.

Link.description: Client-side navigation component extending HTML <a> with prefetching, soft navigation, and back/forward cache support.

Script.description: Optimized third-party script loading component supporting beforeInteractive, afterInteractive, lazyOnload, and worker strategies.

Font.description: Font optimization with automatic self-hosting, zero layout shift, and built-in CSS variable support. Supports Google Fonts and local fonts.

dynamic.signature:
function dynamic

(loader: () => Promise>, options?: DynamicOptions): React.ComponentType
dynamic.description: Lazy loads a component with optional SSR control and custom loading component. Useful for code splitting and reducing initial bundle size.

ImageResponse.description: Generates dynamic Open Graph images using JSX and CSS. Supports Edge runtime and Satori rendering engine.

middleware.signature: function middleware(request: NextRequest): NextResponse | Response | void
middleware.description: Runs before every route match. Used for authentication, redirects, rewrites, header modification, and request interception.

GET.signature: async function GET(request: NextRequest, context: { params: Params }): Response | NextResponse
GET.description: Route Handler for HTTP GET requests. Supports Web Request/Response API with Next.js extensions.

POST.signature: async function POST(request: NextRequest, context: { params: Params }): Response | NextResponse
POST.description: Route Handler for HTTP POST requests. Can parse JSON, FormData, and other request body formats.

PUT.signature: async function PUT(request: NextRequest, context: { params: Params }): Response | NextResponse
PUT.description: Route Handler for HTTP PUT requests. Used for full resource replacement operations.

DELETE.signature: async function DELETE(request: NextRequest, context: { params: Params }): Response | NextResponse
DELETE.description: Route Handler for HTTP DELETE requests. Used for resource deletion operations.

PATCH.signature: async function PATCH(request: NextRequest, context: { params: Params }): Response | NextResponse
PATCH.description: Route Handler for HTTP PATCH requests. Used for partial resource update operations.

HEAD.signature: async function HEAD(request: NextRequest): Response | NextResponse
HEAD.description: Route Handler for HTTP HEAD requests. Returns only headers without response body.

OPTIONS.signature: async function OPTIONS(request: NextRequest): Response | NextResponse
OPTIONS.description: Route Handler for HTTP OPTIONS requests. Used for CORS preflight requests.

getServerSideProps.signature: const getServerSideProps: GetServerSideProps<Props> = async (context) => { return { props } }
getServerSideProps.description: Pages Router function that fetches data on each request for server-side rendering. Receives context with params, req, res, query.

getStaticProps.signature: const getStaticProps: GetStaticProps<Props> = async (context) => { return { props, revalidate? } }
getStaticProps.description: Pages Router function that fetches data at build time for static generation. Supports ISR with revalidate option.

getStaticPaths.signature: const getStaticPaths: GetStaticPaths = async () => { return { paths, fallback } }
getStaticPaths.description: Pages Router function that defines dynamic routes to statically generate at build time. Used with getStaticProps.

useRouter_pages.description: Pages Router hook returning router object with pathname, query, asPath, locale, push, replace, prefetch, back, events.

NextPage.signature:
type NextPage

= React.ComponentType

& { getInitialProps?(context: NextPageContext): IP | Promise }
NextPage.description: Type for page components in Pages Router. Generic type accepting props and initial props type parameters.

Metadata.signature: type Metadata = { title?: string | { absolute?: string; default?: string; template?: string }; description?: string; ... }
Metadata.description: Type for static and dynamic metadata configuration. Supports title, description, openGraph, twitter, icons, robots, and more.

Viewport.signature: type Viewport = { themeColor?: string | ThemeColorDescriptor[]; width?: string | number; initialScale?: number; ... }
Viewport.description: Type for viewport configuration exported from pages and layouts.

NextConfig.signature: type NextConfig = { reactStrictMode?: boolean; images?: ImagesConfig; rewrites?: () => Promise<Rewrite[]>; ... }
NextConfig.description: Type for next.config.js/ts configuration object. Controls build, runtime, and feature settings.

GetServerSideProps_type.signature:
type GetServerSideProps

= (context: GetServerSidePropsContext) => Promise>
GetServerSideProps_type.description: Type for the getServerSideProps function in Pages Router.

GetStaticProps_type.signature:
type GetStaticProps

= (context: GetStaticPropsContext) => Promise>
GetStaticProps_type.description: Type for the getStaticProps function in Pages Router.

GetStaticPaths_type.signature:
type GetStaticPaths

= () => Promise<{ paths: Array; fallback: boolean | 'blocking' }>
GetStaticPaths_type.description: Type for the getStaticPaths function in Pages Router.

ImageProps.description: Props for the Image component including src, alt, width, height, fill, sizes, quality, priority, placeholder, blurDataURL, loader.

LinkProps.signature: interface LinkProps { href: string | URL; as?: string | URL; replace?: boolean; scroll?: boolean; shallow?: boolean; prefetch?: boolean; locale?: string | false; }
LinkProps.description: Props for the Link component including href, replace, scroll, shallow, prefetch, and locale.

ScriptProps.signature: interface ScriptProps { src?: string; strategy?: 'beforeInteractive' | 'afterInteractive' | 'lazyOnload' | 'worker'; onLoad?: () => void; onReady?: () => void; onError?: () => void; }
ScriptProps.description: Props for the Script component with loading strategy control and lifecycle callbacks.

NextFont.signature: type NextFont = { className: string; style: { fontFamily: string; fontWeight?: number; fontStyle?: string }; variable: string; }
NextFont.description: Return type of next/font font loaders. Provides className and CSS variable for applying the font.

MiddlewareConfig.description: Configuration object exported from middleware.ts to define which routes the middleware applies to.

PageProps.signature: type PageProps = { params: Record<string, string>; searchParams: Record<string, string | string[] | undefined> }
PageProps.description: Props received by App Router page components including dynamic route params and URL search parameters.

LayoutProps.signature: type LayoutProps = { children: React.ReactNode; params: Record<string, string> }
LayoutProps.description: Props received by App Router layout components including children and dynamic route params.

MetadataRoute.Sitemap.signature: type Sitemap = Array<{ url: string; lastModified?: string | Date; changeFrequency?: ChangeFrequency; priority?: number; alternates?: { languages?: Record<string, string> } }>
MetadataRoute.Sitemap.description: Return type for sitemap.ts file that generates XML sitemaps.

MetadataRoute.Robots.signature: type Robots = { rules: RobotsRule | RobotsRule[]; sitemap?: string | string[]; host?: string }
MetadataRoute.Robots.description: Return type for robots.ts file that generates robots.txt.

NextApiRequest.signature: interface NextApiRequest extends IncomingMessage { query: Partial<Record<string, string | string[]>>; cookies: Partial<Record<string, string>>; body: any; }
NextApiRequest.description: Pages Router API route request object extending Node.js IncomingMessage with parsed query, cookies, and body.

NextApiResponse.signature: interface NextApiResponse<Data = any> extends ServerResponse { send(body: Data): void; json(body: Data): void; status(statusCode: number): NextApiResponse<Data>; redirect(url: string): NextApiResponse<Data>; }
NextApiResponse.description: Pages Router API route response object with convenience methods for sending responses.

useFormStatus.signature: function useFormStatus(): { pending: boolean; data: FormData | null; method: string | null; action: string | null }
useFormStatus.description: Returns the status of the parent form's last submission. Must be rendered inside a <form>. Works with Server Actions.

useFormState.signature: function useFormState<State>(action: (state: State, payload: FormData) => State | Promise<State>, initialState: State): [State, (payload: FormData) => void]
useFormState.description: Manages form state based on the result of a Server Action. Returns current state and a dispatch function.

useOptimistic.signature: function useOptimistic<State, Action>(state: State, updateFn: (currentState: State, optimisticValue: Action) => State): [State, (action: Action) => void]
useOptimistic.description: Enables optimistic UI updates while an async action (such as a Server Action) is in progress.
